title: Operator state overlay (canonical)
description: Hand-authored operator overlay (taxonomy/operator_state.json). Carries operator-axis flags about indicators that have NO place on the citizen-facing artifact (the pre-pivot lesson per ADR-0026: 2026-05-16 fetched_at smear). Distinct from the indicator catalogue: the catalogue is citizen-axis; this file is operator-axis. Flags include 'frozen' (don't auto-re-fetch), 'refetch_requested' (operator forced a re-pull), 'unavailable_periods' (operator-confirmed gaps that are NOT 'data missing' but 'publisher does not publish for these periods'). Authoring shape JSON (D18); pipeline compiles to taxonomy/operator_state.parquet.

x-changelog.description: Initial canonical operator-state overlay schema (Phase 0.3 of TODO/20260517-canonical-long-format-pivot.md). Replaces pre-pivot indicators-operator-state.schema.json (slated for retirement Phase 0.12 per deletion manifest §3a). Operator-axis only — no fields here should ever bleed into the citizen view-model (D19).

indicator_id.description: FK -> indicator catalogue. The indicator this overlay row applies to.

frozen.description: When true, the ingest scheduler skips this indicator. Used when an upstream is broken / mid-migration / temporarily off-limits.

frozen_reason.description: Required when frozen=true. Operator-readable explanation surfaced in admin v0.

refetch_requested.description: When true, the next scheduler pass re-pulls the upstream regardless of cache. Operator self-clears after the re-pull confirms.

reason.description: Why the publisher doesn't publish for these years (e.g. 'NCRB Crime in India series 1990-1993 not digitised'). Surfaced as renderer caption so the citizen sees 'publisher did not collect' rather than 'data missing'.

unavailable_periods.description: Operator-confirmed periods for which no value exists upstream. Renderer renders these as 'not collected' rather than a null gap.

owner.description: Operator handle (e.g. 'max') responsible for this indicator's ingest. Routing for admin v0.

last_review_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Last time an operator confirmed the overlay state is current. Stale-flag trigger after N days.
